'''Guillermo Aispuro-Bichet''' (born 12 July 2005) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|fb}} for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level.

==Career==
In 2024 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against [[Castleford Tigers]].<ref name="Super League: Catalans Dragons v Castleford Tigers">{{Cite web|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/match-centre/report/4486|title=Super League | Match Report|website=www.superleague.co.uk}}</ref>
